title: Big Signs
description: Adds Signs with BIGGER TEXT to Minecraft! More planned in the future!
body:
Overview
--------

Big Signs is a new mod which adds **Signs with Bigger Text** to Minecraft. At the moment, there are **two** new varieties of sign:

*   **One-Line Signs**
*   **One-Line Hanging Signs**

These new signs come in every vanilla wood type, as well as **20 colours** of metal. They display much larger text than vanilla signs. The sign's model stays the same, so there is only **One Line** of text, with room for only a few characters.

Resource Pack in Images: Vanilla Tweaks - Smoother Font ![One-Line Signs in the world](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_46acca58-8f3c-4371-8ef7-c92542069ea5.png) ![One-Line Signs in the inventory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f0c22620-6df1-4c74-baf8-83ebff1cb62f.png) ![Colourful Metal One-Line Signs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1158019/description_e7d0e581-7252-4daa-8ab4-48191c5204fc.png)

* * *

One-Line Signs are perfect for displaying large numbers in your world. Say goodbye to typing out large Block characters on each line of a vanilla sign - now you can simply type the number into a One-Line Sign, which will display it much more clearly! This is great for train-related builds in the Create mod (as shown below)

![Station platform example](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e966dd01-36f4-452e-a0e6-567fe3c6fcad.png)

* * *

One-Line Signs are also a much more elegant solution than Letter tile blocks, found in some mods. Now, you can fit more than one large letter in the space of one block!

![Letter tiles example](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d6b23184-ef8e-437d-933e-fd2a1c2ee5fa.png)

* * *

Crafting
--------

Wooden One-Line Signs are crafted using 1-to-1 recipes with the vanilla signs. 
![Wooden One-Line Sign crafting recipes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1158019/description_17a40908-e52a-4009-af8f-56874633fd89.png)

Metal One-Line Signs can be dyed into any colour variant, from any other colour. The white variants can be crafted in a 3x3 crafting grid using Iron. 
![Metal Sign crafting recipes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1158019/description_a54bfa32-41e5-4a98-a48b-502d5c7eeddd.png)

* * *

Download and Install
--------------------

Big Signs is available for Minecraft **1.20.1** on **Forge or NeoForge**. There are no required dependencies - No other mods are needed to use this mod! Simply place it in your `.minecraft/mods` folder, and you're good to go.

I will not be porting the mod to other versions of the game yet. I want to get the main features implemented before doing this.

* * *

Planned Features
----------------

I have many more features planned for the Big Signs mod, including physically bigger signs of course!

**Thin Signs**

*   A type of One-Line Sign, but with the vanilla text size and a physically thinner body.
*   Can be placed on either the top, middle or bottom part of a block.

**Directional Signs**

*   Allowing any sign to be pointed on either end, to act as an arrow sign.
*   For Thin Signs, this would be very similar to Way Signs from the [Supplementaries](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/supplementaries) mod.

**Billboard Blocks**

*   A type of sign which uses a full block of space. Acts similar to the Framed Wall Board from **[Framed Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framedblocks)**.
*   Can be placed on either the Back, Middle or Front of a block.
*   When placed next to each other (in a rectangle shape), they form a larger sign which takes up the whole area.
*   This would allow for long bodies of text to be displayed in the world, or for large advertisements, for instance.

**Improved Text GUI**

*   Eventually, I plan to overhaul the vanilla text-editing GUI for signs. This includes:
*   Options for Bold, Underlined and Italic text
*   Text size and colour options, allowing for different text size on each line, or a different colour per character.
*   Text alignment options - Left, Centred or Right.
*   In Creative Mode, there would be the option to add a command to execute when the sign is right-clicked in the world.
